ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
Language: javascript
Unrestricted Open-source alternative to AI video platforms — Free AI image & video generation studio with 200+ models (Flux, Midjourney, Kling, Sora, Veo). No content filters. Self-hosted, MIT licensed.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Axorax/awesome-free-apps
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Axorax/awesome-free-apps
Language: javascript
Curated list of the best free apps for PC and mobile

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WebKit/WebKit
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WebKit/WebKit
Language: javascript
Home of the WebKit project, the browser engine used by Safari, Mail, App Store and many other applications on macOS, iOS and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coreyhaines31/marketingskills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coreyhaines31/marketingskills
Language: javascript
Marketing skills for Claude Code and AI agents. CRO, copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: fleetbase/fleetbase
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/fleetbase/fleetbase
Language: javascript
Modular logistics and supply chain operating system (LSOS)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: microsoft/power-platform-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/power-platform-skills
Language: javascript
A plugin marketplace for Claude Code/GitHub Copilot that provides Power Platform development plugins, including reusable skills, agents, and commands for building and deploying solutions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: mm7894215/TokenTracker
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mm7894215/TokenTracker
Language: javascript
Local-first AI token usage & cost tracker for 27 coding tools — with a desktop pet, 4 widgets, achievements, native macOS/Windows apps, and a one-command CLI. Never reads prompts.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: schlagmichdoch/PairDrop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/schlagmichdoch/PairDrop
Language: javascript
PairDrop: Transfer Files Cross-Platform. No Setup, No Signup.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: thedotmack/claude-mem
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/thedotmack/claude-mem
Language: javascript
Persistent Context Across Sessions for Every Agent – Captures everything your agent does during sessions, compresses it with AI, and injects relevant context back into future sessions. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Gemini, Hermes, Copilot, OpenCode + More

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wwebjs/whatsapp-web.js
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wwebjs/whatsapp-web.js
Language: javascript
A WhatsApp client library for NodeJS that connects through the WhatsApp Web browser app
